# ElevenClicks — IT Company, Ontario, Canada

ElevenClicks is a Canadian IT company based in Ontario that delivers custom web applications, Android and iOS mobile apps, website maintenance, and AI solutions for Canadian businesses. Founded in 2019. Contact: info@elevenclicks.com

## What We Build

- **Web Development** — Next.js, React, Ruby on Rails, Node.js, Python/Django/FastAPI web apps and SaaS platforms. E-commerce (Shopify, custom). API development (REST, GraphQL).
- **Android & iOS Mobile Apps** — Native Android with Kotlin and Jetpack Compose; cross-platform with Flutter or React Native.
- **Website Maintenance** — Plugin/CMS updates, daily backups, security monitoring, uptime monitoring, performance audits. Care plans for businesses that need reliable ongoing support.
- **AI Solutions** — Custom AI integration using OpenAI GPT-4o, Anthropic Claude, Google Gemini. RAG pipelines, AI chatbots, automation, fine-tuning.
- **Ruby on Rails** — New builds, legacy upgrades, SaaS products, REST APIs, Stripe marketplaces. Rails 6, 7, and 8.
- **Node.js / TypeScript** — Scalable backends, real-time APIs, microservices.
- **Python** — Web apps, automation scripts, data pipelines, ML integration.

## Service Area

Ontario, Canada and remote across Canada.

## How We Work

1. Free 30-minute discovery call
2. Detailed proposal with scope and pricing within 48 hours
3. Agile sprints with weekly check-ins
4. Launch, deployment, and ongoing support

## Key Pages

- Homepage: https://elevenclicks.com
- Services: https://elevenclicks.com/services
- About: https://elevenclicks.com/about
- Contact / Free Quote: https://elevenclicks.com/contact

## Common Questions

**How long does a website project take?**
Marketing sites: 2–4 weeks. Web apps and e-commerce: 6–12 weeks.

**Do you work with small businesses?**
Yes — many clients are startups and small businesses. We match scope to budget.

**What AI tools do you integrate?**
OpenAI GPT-4o, Anthropic Claude, Google Gemini, and open-source models. We build RAG pipelines and connect AI to your existing data.

**Do you do Ruby on Rails?**
Yes, it is one of our core specialties — new builds, SaaS, APIs, and legacy upgrades.

**How do I start?**
Contact us at https://elevenclicks.com/contact for a free discovery call.
